message:
feat(palette): replace custom palette overlay with ftui CommandPalette widget (1mfw3.1.3)

Delegates palette rendering, filtering, scoring and selection to the
ftui CommandPalette widget.  Raw keyboard events are peeked from the
thread-local stash and forwarded to the widget's handle_event(), with
Execute/Dismiss results translated through the PaletteResult adapter
layer.  The old render_palette_overlay() method is removed.

Changes:
- Add peek_raw_event() to read raw event without consuming it
- Add palette interceptor block in update() between detail modal and
  analytics surface interceptions
- Wire command_palette.open()/close() into PaletteOpened/Closed/
  QuitRequested/PaletteActionExecuted handlers
- Replace render_palette_overlay() call with Widget::render()
- Add action_id() and action_by_id() helpers to palette.rs
- Add 8 integration tests for widget lifecycle and interceptor behavior

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
